name: Data Visualization
description: A visual representation technique used to transform structured or unstructured data into perceptually interpretable forms, enabling efficient exploration of patterns, trends, and the space of possible affirmations about the underlying reality.

name: Standard Deviation
description: A statistical measure of dispersion that quantifies the extent of variability or spread in a dataset relative to its mean, enabling affirmations about consistency, volatility, and distributional structure.
